note: PNW/Rainier-edifice Q(f)=25 f^0.5 (Q≈74 at the band center) gives r_e≈790 m vs ≈210 m for Tsai Q=20. Observed 5-15 Hz power is still ~distance-independent over 0.2-2 km (weaker decay than even the PNW prediction) -> the band retains less-attenuated lower-frequency energy; site response + crude distances limit a data-driven Q.
